description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical aluminum can with a vibrant red background and prominent white Coca-Cola branding. The front features the iconic Coca-Cola script logo in large, flowing letters, while one side displays a white silhouette of the classic glass Coca-Cola bottle. The back of the can includes nutritional information, a barcode, and a volume marking of 200 ml, all printed in white. The top is metallic silver with a standard pull-tab opening mechanism. The can's surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light and emphasizing its clean, modern appearance.
description: A tall, red Coca-Cola can with white branding, a bottle silhouette, and a silver pull-tab top. The surface is smooth and glossy, with detailed text and logos.
description_view_0: The can is shown with the white bottle silhouette and partial Coca-Cola logo visible on a red background.
description_view_1: This view highlights the back of the can, showing nutritional information, barcode, and the 200 ml volume marking.
description_view_2: The side view displays the barcode, nutritional facts, and part of the Coca-Cola script logo wrapping around the can.
description_view_3: The front view prominently features the large, white Coca-Cola script logo on a red background.
attribute_label_or_branding: White Coca-Cola script logo, white bottle silhouette, nutritional information, barcode, and 200 ml volume marking, all printed in white on a red background.
